ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the booking */,
  "trip_type" TEXT /* Type of trip (e.g., RoundTrip, OneWay) */,
  "purchase_lead" INTEGER /* Lead time in days before the flight */,
  "length_of_stay" INTEGER /* Length of stay in days */,
  "flight_hour" INTEGER /* Departure hour of the flight */,
  "flight_day" TEXT /* Day of the week of the flight (e.g., Sat, Sun) */,
  "route" TEXT /* Route of the flight (e.g., AKLDEL) */,
  "booking_origin" TEXT /* Origin of the booking (e.g., New Zealand, India) */,
  "booking_complete" INTEGER /* Indicator whether the booking is complete (0/1) */,
  "sales_channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales channel through which the booking was made */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the booking, including all options */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the booking was made */,
  "booking_status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., pending, confirmed, cancelled) */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date when the booking was made */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, unpaid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_sales_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_channel_id") REFERENCES sales_channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_route FOREIGN KEY ("route") REFERENCES flight_routes ("route_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "membership_status" TEXT /* Membership status of the customer (e.g., gold, silver, bronze) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales channel */,
  "channel_description" TEXT /* Description of the sales channel */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the sales channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_code" TEXT /* Code for the route (e.g., AKLDEL) */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin airport of the route */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination airport of the route */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the route in kilometers */,
  "flight_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of flights on this route (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight schedule */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route for this flight */,
  "flight_date" TEXT /* Date of the flight */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Departure time of the flight */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Arrival time of the flight */,
  "flight_duration" REAL /* Duration of the flight in hours */,
  "aircraft_model" TEXT /* Model of the aircraft for this flight */,
  "gate_number" TEXT /* Gate number for boarding */,
  "terminal" TEXT /* Terminal number at the airport */,
  "flight_status" TEXT /* Status of the flight (e.g., on time, delayed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_schedules_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES flight_routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "booking_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking option */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking for this option */,
  "option_name" TEXT /* Name of the option (e.g., extra baggage) */,
  "option_value" TEXT /* Value of the option (e.g., 1/0 for yes/no) */,
  "option_price" REAL /* Price of the option */,
  "option_description" TEXT /* Description of the option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_booking_options_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking for this payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of payment */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID for the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, customer service representative, admin) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "booking_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking history entry */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking for this history entry */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date when the booking was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., pending, confirmed, cancelled) */,
  "status_change_date" TEXT /* Date when the booking status was last changed */,
  "status_change_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who changed the booking status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_booking_history_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_booking_history_status_change_by FOREIGN KEY ("status_change_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking for this review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was made */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the flight (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments about the flight */,
  "flight_quality_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for flight quality (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "service_quality_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for service quality (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "cleanliness_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for cleanliness (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_reviews_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer preference */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer for this preference */,
  "preference_name" TEXT /* Name of the preference (e.g., meal option) */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference (e.g., vegetarian) */,
  "preference_description" TEXT /* Description of the preference */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicator whether the preference is default (0/1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
